name: Shanghai Kangda New Materials Group Co., Ltd.
summary: Shanghai Kangda New Materials Group Co., Ltd. engages in the research and development, manufacture, and sale of adhesives and sealants in the People's Republic of China. It offers approximately 200 types of products, including epoxy adhesives, polyurethane adhesives, acrylate AB adhesives, cyanoacrylate adhesives, UV curing adhesives, silicon rubbers, anaerobic adhesives, butyl hot melt adhesives, industrial repair putty products, spray polyurea, and others. The company's products are primarily used in the fields of automotive assembly, engineering, plastic, maintenance and repair, loudspeaker assembling, wind and solar energy power plants, environmental packing, transportation, anti-corrosion, ports and mines, rubber conveyer belt repairing, elevator manufacturing, military equipment, mechanical equipment, electronic appliances, construction reinforcement, and others. In addition, it provides technical support and after-sale services. The company was formerly known as Shanghai KangDa New Materials Co., Ltd. and changed its name to Shanghai Kangda New Materials Group Co., Ltd. in September 2019. Shanghai Kangda New Materials Group Co., Ltd. was founded in 1988 and is based in Shanghai, the People's Republic of China.
